creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2010-12-16 02:55:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/webtrees         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/webtrees/files   pkg-deinstall.in pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  webtrees is the web's leading online collaborative genealogy
  application. webtrees works from standard GEDCOM files, and is
  therefore compatible with every major desktop application.  webtrees
  aims to to be efficient and effective by using the right combination
  of third-party tools, design techniques and open standards.
  
  WWW: http://webtrees.net/
  
  PR:             ports/153160
  Submitted by:   "J.R. Oldroyd" <fbsd@opal.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2779    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/www/webtrees/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/webtrees/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/www/webtrees/files/pkg-deinstall.in (new)
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/www/webtrees/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/webtrees/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3874 -0   ports/www/webtrees/pkg-plist (new)
